notes: Small clean leaf file (168 lines, 4 theorems, 0 sorries). `Valuation.isEquiv_eq_of_surjective_withZeroInt` and `pointValuation_surjective'` are deliberate Fintype-free re-derivations of results in `Hasse/L6Witnesses.lean` to avoid `[Fintype K]` dependencies. `comap_pointValuation_eq_of_isEquiv_of_ord_eq_one` is the main export, heavily used across `SamePlace.lean`, `DivisorPullback.lean`, `MulByIntSamePlace.lean`, and others.
